title: Fire's Pokemon
description: This datapack adds my pokemon models in Cobblemon
body:
This addon is aimed at adding new Pokemon for the Cobblemon mod. I will delight you with new Pokemon every time!

Pokemon that are in the addon:
- Snom
- Frosmoth
- snover
- abomasnow
- sinistea
- polteageist
- giratina 
- palkia
- quagsire
- audino (with mega compatabily in mega showdown)
